1131.reason: [This uses lastWord.getLineNum(), but lastWord may not correspond to the actual location where the semicolon is expected because additional tokens may have been consumed after the relevant construct]

1147.reason: [When an error is detected, the parser doesn't consume any token or advance the current position, which can cause infinite loops or repeated error reporting on the same position]
